divisions.name: Dhaka
divisions.description: The capital and largest division of Bangladesh, home to the bustling megacity of Dhaka and rich Mughal heritage.

divisions.name: Chittagong
divisions.description: Bangladesh's second largest division, featuring the port city of Chattogram, scenic hill tracts, and Cox's Bazar beach.

divisions.name: Rajshahi
divisions.description: Known as the Silk City, Rajshahi is famous for its mangoes, silk, and ancient archaeological sites.

divisions.name: Khulna
divisions.description: Gateway to the Sundarbans, the world's largest mangrove forest, and home to diverse wildlife including the Royal Bengal Tiger.

divisions.name: Barisal
divisions.description: The Venice of the East, Barisal is a river-laced division famous for floating guava markets and lush green landscapes.

divisions.name: Sylhet
divisions.description: The land of tea gardens and haor wetlands, Sylhet offers breathtaking natural beauty and unique cultural heritage.

divisions.name: Rangpur
divisions.description: A northern agricultural division dotted with historical mosques, temples, and the scenic Teesta river landscape.

divisions.name: Mymensingh
divisions.description: Home to the famous Bangladesh Agricultural University and the scenic Brahmaputra riverbank, rich in natural beauty.

tours.title: Old Dhaka Heritage Walk
tours.description: Explore the historic lanes of Old Dhaka including Lalbagh Fort, Ahsan Manzil, and the bustling Sadarghat river port.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive at Sadarghat, boat ride on the Buriganga river, visit Lalbagh Fort
Day 1 Evening: Explore Ahsan Manzil Pink Palace, walk through Star Mosque
Day 1 Night: Street food tour in Chawkbazar

tours.title: Dhaka City Lights Luxury Tour
tours.description: Experience the modern side of Dhaka with rooftop dining, five-star hotel stays, and exclusive city sightseeing.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrival, check-in to five-star hotel, rooftop welcome dinner
Day 2: Hatirjheel lake tour, Bashundhara City Mall, fine dining
Day 3: National Museum, Liberation War Museum, farewell brunch

tours.title: Sonargaon Ancient Capital Tour
tours.description: Visit the ancient capital Sonargaon with its 400-year-old ruins, folk art museum, and the mystical Panam Nagar ghost city.
tourPlan: Morning: Depart Dhaka, arrive Sonargaon
Midday: Visit Panam Nagar, Folk Art Museum
Afternoon: Explore Goaldi Mosque, Baro Sardar Bari
Evening: Return to Dhaka

tours.title: Dhaka Food & Culture Trail
tours.description: Immerse yourself in Dhaka's rich culinary culture through street food tours, local restaurant visits, and cooking workshops.
tourPlan: Day 1 Morning: Old Dhaka street food tour – biryani, kebab, pitha
Day 1 Afternoon: Traditional Bangladeshi cooking class
Day 2: Dhanmondi food street, dessert & chai trail

tours.title: Dhaka Family Fun Weekend
tours.description: A fun-filled family tour covering fantasy kingdom, national zoo, botanical gardens, and the science museum.
tourPlan: Day 1: National Zoo Mirpur, Botanical Garden
Day 1 Evening: Fantasy Kingdom Ashulia
Day 2: Bangabandhu Science & Technology Museum, return to Dhaka

tours.title: Cox's Bazar Sunrise Beach Tour
tours.description: Experience the world's longest natural sea beach at Cox's Bazar with sunrise walks, surfing, and fresh seafood dining.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Cox's Bazar, check-in, evening beach walk
Day 2: Sunrise surfing session, Himchari waterfall visit
Day 3: Inani beach, seafood BBQ dinner
Day 4: Departure

tours.title: Bandarban Hill Trekking Adventure
tours.description: Trek through Bandarban's stunning hill ranges, visit indigenous tribal villages, and camp under the stars.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Bandarban, acclimatization trek
Day 2: Trek to Boga Lake, tribal village visit
Day 3: Summit attempt of Keokradong (highest peak)
Day 4: Nafakhum waterfall trek
Day 5: Return to Bandarban, departure

tours.title: Rangamati Lake & Tribal Culture Tour
tours.description: Sail across Kaptai Lake, visit Chakma tribal villages, and explore the natural wonders of Rangamati hill district.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Rangamati, Kaptai Lake boat cruise at sunset
Day 2: Chakma tribal village, handloom weaving workshop, waterfall
Day 3: Hanging Bridge, Buddhist temple, departure

tours.title: Khagrachhari Eco-Trek
tours.description: An immersive eco-tour through Khagrachhari's green hills, bamboo forests, and waterfall-rich landscapes.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive, nature orientation, evening bamboo forest walk
Day 2: Waterfall trek, indigenous village visit, stargazing
Day 3: Morning bird watching, departure

tours.title: Cox's Bazar Luxury Resort Escape
tours.description: Indulge in a lavish beachside retreat with private pool villas, yacht rides, deep-sea fishing, and gourmet dining.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrival by private car, sunset yacht cruise, welcome dinner
Day 2: Deep-sea fishing, Inani beach, spa session
Day 3: Helicopter coastal view ride, seafood gala dinner
Day 4: Departure

tours.title: Mahasthangarh Archaeological Tour
tours.description: Explore Mahasthangarh, one of the oldest archaeological sites in Bangladesh, and discover the lost city of Pundranagar.
tourPlan: Day 1: Depart Rajshahi, arrive Mahasthangarh, excavation site visit
Day 1 Afternoon: Mahasthangarh Museum, Govinda Bhita temple ruins
Day 2: Gokul Medh stupa, local village walk, return

tours.title: Rajshahi Mango Garden & Silk Tour
tours.description: Visit the famous Rajshahi mango orchards, witness silk weaving, and taste the finest mangoes and local cuisine.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Rajshahi, mango orchard tour, mango tasting session
Day 2: Silk weaving factory in Rajshahi, Varendra Research Museum
Day 3: Chapai Nawabganj mango market, Shibganj mosque, return

tours.title: Puthia Temple Complex Pilgrimage
tours.description: Visit the largest Hindu temple complex in Bangladesh at Puthia, featuring magnificent 19th-century terracotta temples.
tourPlan: Morning: Depart Rajshahi, arrive Puthia
Midday: Visit Shiva Temple, Govinda Temple, Dol Mancha
Afternoon: Ananta Basu Uddin Temple, royal pond, return to Rajshahi

tours.title: Padma River Boating & Nature Escape
tours.description: Enjoy a serene boat journey along the mighty Padma River with fishing, dolphin spotting, and riverside village visits.
tourPlan: Day 1: Morning departure from Rajshahi Ghat, dolphin spotting, riverside picnic
Day 1 Evening: Fishing session, houseboat overnight stay
Day 2: Sunrise on the Padma, village market visit, return

tours.title: Rajshahi Varsity & Barind Landscape Tour
tours.description: A nature and educational tour covering the beautiful Rajshahi University campus and the unique Barind Tract landscape.
tourPlan: Day 1: RU campus botanical walk, Shaheed Smriti Sangrahashala
Day 2: Barind Tract eco-drive, Naogaon historical sites, return

tours.title: Sundarbans Royal Bengal Tiger Safari
tours.description: Venture deep into the UNESCO World Heritage Sundarbans for a thrilling wildlife safari and spot the elusive Royal Bengal Tiger.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Khulna, board cruise, sail into Sundarbans
Day 2: Morning wildlife watch – spotted deer, crocodiles, birds
Day 3: Tiger watch from watchtower, deep forest canoe ride
Day 4: Hiron Point lighthouse, bird sanctuary visit
Day 5: Return to Khulna, departure

tours.title: Sundarbans Mangrove Eco-Tour
tours.description: An eco-friendly journey through Sundarbans' mangrove ecosystem, learning about biodiversity conservation and forest life.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Mongla, eco-briefing, sail into the forest
Day 2: Mangrove planting session, Kotka wildlife sanctuary
Day 3: Bird watching dawn tour, honey collection demo
Day 4: Dublar Char island, return to Mongla

tours.title: Kumarkhali Baul Music & River Tour
tours.description: A cultural journey to Kushtia exploring the birthplace of Lalon Fakir, live Baul music performances, and Gorai river trips.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Kushtia, Lalon Shah Mazar visit, Baul music workshop
Day 1 Evening: Live Baul concert at Lalon Akhra
Day 2: Gorai river boat ride, Rabindranath's Shilaidaha Kuthibari, return

tours.title: Sixty Dome Mosque & Bagerhat Heritage Tour
tours.description: Discover the UNESCO-listed Sixty Dome Mosque of Bagerhat and the historic mosques of Khan Jahan Ali's medieval city.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Bagerhat, Sixty Dome Mosque, Khan Jahan Ali's tomb
Day 1 Afternoon: Singarair Mosque, Zindapir Mosque, Shat Gambuj Museum
Day 2: Khulna Division Museum, return

tours.title: Khulna Family Sundarbans Day Trip
tours.description: A safe and exciting one-day family adventure to the edge of the Sundarbans with boat rides, wildlife spotting, and picnic.
tourPlan: Morning: Depart Khulna, boat ride to forest edge
Midday: Wildlife spotting, picnic on sandbank
Afternoon: Return to Khulna, local market visit

tours.title: Barisal Floating Guava Market Tour
tours.description: Witness the unique floating guava gardens of Barisal, a rare agricultural wonder of Bangladesh on water.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Barisal, boat to floating guava market, harvest experience
Day 1 Evening: Canal-side dinner at local homestead
Day 2: Local village visit, boat back, departure

tours.title: Kuakata Sea Beach & Sunrise Tour
tours.description: Visit Kuakata, the only beach in Bangladesh where you can see both sunrise and sunset, and explore Buddhist temples.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Kuakata, sunset at the beach, seafood dinner
Day 2: 5 AM sunrise watch, Gangamata Mandir temple, Jhau Forest
Day 3: Seal island boat trip, Fat Budda temple (Adinath Mandir)
Day 4: Sunrise farewell, departure

tours.title: Barisal Canal & River Village Life Tour
tours.description: Explore the intricate network of rivers and canals of Barisal and experience authentic village life in the water region.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Barisal, embark houseboat, canal cruise
Day 2: Village life immersion – paddy fields, fishing, local handicrafts
Day 3: Morning market visit, return to Barisal

tours.title: Barisal Patuakhali Mangrove Walk
tours.description: Trek through the coastal mangroves of Patuakhali, observe migratory birds, and discover coastal fishing communities.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Patuakhali, mangrove trail walk, bird watching
Day 1 Evening: Fishing community dinner experience
Day 2: Sunrise bird count, coastal boat ride, return

tours.title: Barisal Religious Heritage Circuit
tours.description: Visit the historic mosques, temples, and churches of Barisal city, experiencing the region's multi-faith heritage.
tourPlan: Morning: Oxfam Church, Sher-e-Bangla Museum
Midday: Barisal's historic mosques – Kalibari & Durga Mandir
Afternoon: Barisal Cathedral, local lunch, return

tours.title: Srimangal Tea Garden Adventure
tours.description: Explore the lush tea gardens of Srimangal, the tea capital of Bangladesh, and visit Lawachara rainforest.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Srimangal, tea garden walk, sunset at tea hills
Day 2: Lawachara National Park rainforest trek, monkey watching
Day 3: Finlay Tea Estate, tea factory tour, 7-layer tea tasting
Day 4: Departure from Srimangal

tours.title: Sylhet Haor Wetland Boat Safari
tours.description: Sail through the vast haor wetlands of Sylhet during monsoon and witness migratory birds, floating villages, and fishermen.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Sylhet, travel to Haor, sunset boat ride
Day 2: Dawn bird watching, floating village visit, fishing experience
Day 3: Sunrise over haor, return to Sylhet

tours.title: Jaflong Crystal Clear River Tour
tours.description: Visit the stunning Jaflong, where crystal clear rivers from Meghalaya meet stone-collecting communities and lush green hills.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Sylhet, drive to Jaflong, river walk
Day 2: Dawki river crossing to India border view, Khasi village visit
Day 3: Tamabil border, waterfall trek, return

tours.title: Sylhet Sufi Shrine Pilgrimage
tours.description: A spiritual journey visiting the Shrine of Hazrat Shah Jalal, one of the most revered Islamic shrines in Bangladesh.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Sylhet, Shah Jalal Shrine, dargah evening prayers
Day 2: Shah Paran Shrine, Keane Bridge, Osmani Museum, departure

tours.title: Sylhet Luxury Tea Resort Retreat
tours.description: Unwind in a luxury boutique resort nestled in the heart of a tea garden, with spa, yoga, and private plantation walks.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrival, welcome tea ceremony, sunset yoga
Day 2: Private tea garden walk, high tea, spa session
Day 3: Lawachara forest excursion, gourmet dinner
Day 4: Tea blending masterclass, leisure day
Day 5: Farewell breakfast, departure

tours.title: Teesta River Rafting & Camp
tours.description: Experience the thrill of river rafting on the Teesta river in Rangpur followed by a riverside camping night under the stars.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Lalmonirhat, safety training, first rafting session
Day 2: Full-day river rafting on Teesta, riverside picnic
Day 2 Evening: Campfire, stargazing, overnight camp
Day 3: Morning dip, breakfast, departure

tours.title: Kantajew Temple & Dinajpur Heritage Tour
tours.description: Marvel at the magnificent terracotta Kantajew Temple of Dinajpur, a 18th-century architectural masterpiece.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Dinajpur, Kantajew Temple, Nayabad Mosque
Day 2: Rajbari Palace ruins, Dinajpur Museum, Sura Mosque, return

tours.title: Rangpur Ramsagar & Nature Park Tour
tours.description: Visit Ramsagar, the largest man-made lake in Bangladesh and Rangpur's lush nature parks and wildlife sanctuary.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Dinajpur, Ramsagar Lake picnic, rowing boat
Day 2: Rangpur Zoo, Tajhat Palace, Rangpur Museum, return

tours.title: Rangpur Cultural Festival Tour
tours.description: Experience the vibrant cultural heritage of Rangpur through local festivals, folk music, and traditional handicraft markets.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive, Rangpur Pohela Boishakh festival, cultural procession
Day 2: Folk music concert, Gamcha weaving workshop, local cuisine dinner
Day 3: Rangpur Sadar market, crafts fair, departure

tours.title: Rangpur Family Picnic & Countryside Ride
tours.description: A fun-filled countryside family trip exploring Rangpur's tobacco fields, lychee orchards, and riverside meadows.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Rangpur, lychee orchard tour, tobacco field walk, picnic
Day 2: Teesta riverside meadow, kite flying, local lunch, return

tours.title: Mymensingh Botanical Garden & Brahmaputra Tour
tours.description: Explore the stunning botanical gardens of Bangladesh Agricultural University and enjoy a sunset cruise on the Brahmaputra.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Mymensingh, BAU Botanical Garden, museum
Day 1 Evening: Brahmaputra river sunset cruise
Day 2: Shashi Lodge heritage site, Mymensingh town walk, return

tours.title: Garo Hills & Tribal Life Experience
tours.description: Journey into the Garo Hills of Mymensingh, visit indigenous Garo tribal villages, and discover their unique culture.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Haluaghat, Garo village orientation, cultural welcome
Day 2: Hill trek, traditional Garo kitchen cooking, music performance
Day 3: Bamboo crafts workshop, return to Mymensingh

tours.title: Mymensingh Adventure Forest Camp
tours.description: Camp in the forest areas of Mymensingh with ziplining, rock climbing, and overnight survival skill adventure challenges.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Durgapur, camp setup, orientation hike
Day 2: Rock climbing, zipline, survival skills workshop
Day 3: Birishiri hills walk, Boro Khal river
Day 4: Debrief, return to Mymensingh

tours.title: Birishiri White Clay Lake Tour
tours.description: Visit the stunning blue-white clay lake at Birishiri, one of the most photogenic natural wonders of Mymensingh.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Birishiri, white clay lake exploration, photography session
Day 1 Evening: Someshwari river walk, local village dinner
Day 2: Morning lake walk, Tribal cultural village, return

tours.title: Mymensingh Family Heritage Walk
tours.description: A family-friendly heritage walk through old Mymensingh visiting zamindari palaces, heritage buildings, and river banks.
tourPlan: Morning: Shashi Lodge Palace, Alexander Castle
Midday: Mymensingh Museum, traditional lunch
Afternoon: Brahmaputra riverfront walk, local market

tours.title: Dhaka Dhaleswari River Eco-Tour
tours.description: A serene eco-tour on the Dhaleswari river exploring riverine biodiversity, fishing villages, and wetland habitats.
tourPlan: Day 1: Depart Dhaka, arrive Manikganj, afternoon river cruise
Day 2: Morning fishing, wetland walk, bird spotting, return

tours.title: Narsingdi Rural Village Life Tour
tours.description: Immerse in rural Bangladesh life, visiting paddy fields, traditional weavers, and village folk fairs in Narsingdi.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Narsingdi, paddy field walk, weaving workshop
Day 2: Village folk fair, traditional music, local lunch, return

tours.title: Inani Beach & Coral Snorkeling Tour
tours.description: Discover the rocky coral reefs and crystal waters of Inani beach, the most pristine part of Cox's Bazar coast.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Cox's Bazar, transfer to Inani, evening beach walk
Day 2: Morning snorkeling at coral reef, underwater photography
Day 3: Beach volleyball, seafood lunch, departure

tours.title: Sylhet Tea Garden Sunrise Trek
tours.description: Wake before dawn for a guided trek through Sylhet's rolling tea gardens to catch the golden sunrise over the hills.
tourPlan: Day 1 Evening: Arrive Srimangal, garden orientation, star gazing
Day 2: 4 AM wake-up, sunrise tea garden trek, hilltop breakfast, tea tasting, return

tours.title: Chittagong Port & City History Tour
tours.description: Explore the historical and commercial heart of Chittagong city, its colonial-era buildings, and the iconic port.
tourPlan: Day 1: Chittagong Port observation deck, Patenga beach, World War II Cemetery
Day 2: Chittagong City Corporation heritage walk, Ethnological Museum, Foy's Lake

tours.title: Khulna Mangrove Photography Tour
tours.description: A professional photography tour through the golden light of the Sundarbans mangroves with expert photography coaches.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Khulna, gear check, photography briefing
Day 2: Dawn shoot in mangroves, wildlife photography session
Day 3: Sunset golden hour photography at creeks
Day 4: Portfolio review, return to Khulna

tours.title: Rajshahi Romantic Couple Getaway
tours.description: A romantic escape along the Padma riverfront, with candlelit river dinners, mango orchards, and sunset boat cruises.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrival, flower welcome, riverside check-in, candlelit dinner
Day 2: Mango orchard picnic, sunset Padma river cruise, gala dinner
Day 3: Morning silk shopping, farewell brunch, departure

tours.title: Dhaka Liberation War Historical Tour
tours.description: A deeply moving historical tour visiting the Liberation War Museum, Rayerbazar killing field, and national martyrs memorial.
tourPlan: Morning: Liberation War Museum, Rayerbazar Intellectual Memorial
Afternoon: Savar National Memorial (Jatiyo Smriti Shoudho)
Evening: Candle lighting ceremony, return to Dhaka

tours.title: Sylhet Ratargul Swamp Forest Canoe Tour
tours.description: Glide through Ratargul, Bangladesh's only freshwater swamp forest, in traditional dugout canoes amid ancient Hijol trees.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Sylhet, drive to Ratargul, afternoon canoe through swamp
Day 1 Evening: Campfire at forest edge, firefly watching
Day 2: Dawn paddle, photography, return to Sylhet

tours.title: Rangpur Haripur Gas Field & Industrial Tour
tours.description: An educational industrial tour to Haripur natural gas field in Rangpur, learning about Bangladesh's energy sector.
tourPlan: Morning: Depart Rangpur, arrive Haripur Gas Field
Midday: Safety briefing, guided field tour
Afternoon: Q&A with engineers, return to Rangpur

tours.title: Cox's Bazar Beach Volleyball & Sports Camp
tours.description: Join a sports adventure camp at Cox's Bazar with beach volleyball, surfing competitions, and beach marathon.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive, fitness assessment, evening beach jog
Day 2: Surfing training, volleyball tournament
Day 3: Beach marathon, swimming competition
Day 4: Awards ceremony, departure

tours.title: Dhaka Art & Craft Workshop Tour
tours.description: A creative cultural tour through Dhaka's art districts, rickshaw art workshops, Jamdani weaving centers, and galleries.
tourPlan: Day 1: Rickshaw art painting workshop, Dhaka Art Center gallery
Day 2: Jamdani weaving center in Demra, Shankhari Bazaar craft lane

tours.title: Bandarban Amiakhum Waterfall Trek
tours.description: Trek to Amiakhum, one of the most breathtaking waterfalls hidden deep in Bandarban's jungle wilderness.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Bandarban, permit check, overnight in Thainkhali
Day 2: Jungle trek to Remakri Falls
Day 3: Trek to Amiakhum, overnight camp
Day 4: Waterfall swimming, return trek to Remakri
Day 5: Return to Bandarban, departure

tours.title: Sylhet Family Tea & Nature Package
tours.description: A perfect family trip to Sylhet combining tea garden exploration, waterfalls, and interactive nature activities for kids.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Sylhet, check-in, evening garden walk
Day 2: Srimangal tea gardens, tea tasting for kids
Day 3: Madhabkunda waterfall swim, eco-resort
Day 4: Return journey, local market stop

tours.title: Khulna Shrimp Farm & Coastal Life Tour
tours.description: Learn about Bangladesh's famous shrimp farming industry with a guided visit to shrimp farms and coastal fishing communities.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Paikgacha, shrimp farm tour, seafood lunch by canal
Day 2: Coastal fishing village, net casting demo, local market, return

tours.title: Rajshahi Sompur Mahavihara Tour
tours.description: Discover the magnificent Paharpur Buddhist Vihara, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and the largest monastery south of the Himalayas.
tourPlan: Day 1: Depart Rajshahi, arrive Paharpur, vihara excavation tour
Day 1 Afternoon: Paharpur Museum, Buddhist stupa
Day 2: Surrounding archaeological field, return to Rajshahi

tours.title: Barisal Padma & Meghna River Confluence Tour
tours.description: Witness the spectacular confluence of the Padma, Meghna, and Jamuna rivers on a multi-day river cruise from Barisal.
tourPlan: Day 1: Board cruise at Barisal, sail toward Meghna
Day 2: Bhola island stop, Irrawaddy dolphin watching
Day 3: Confluence point photography, river fishing
Day 4: Return to Barisal, debrief

tours.title: Dhaka Mosque Circuit Pilgrimage
tours.description: Visit the most iconic mosques of Dhaka including the Star Mosque, Baitul Mukarram, and Choto Katra.
tourPlan: Morning: Baitul Mukarram National Mosque, Star Mosque (Tara Masjid)
Midday: Choto Katra, Khan Mohammad Mridha Mosque
Afternoon: Binat Bibi Mosque, Hossaini Dalan, return

tours.title: Mymensingh Agro-Tourism Farm Stay
tours.description: Stay at an agricultural farm in Mymensingh, participate in crop harvesting, livestock care, and farm-to-table cooking.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive farm, orientation, evening livestock feeding
Day 2: Morning harvest, farm-to-table cooking class, evening bonfire
Day 3: Organic market visit, farewell breakfast, return

tours.title: Sylhet Madhabpur Lake Tour
tours.description: Visit Madhabpur Lake in Habiganj, a stunning lake surrounded by tea gardens with seasonal migrating birds in winter.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Habiganj, Madhabpur Lake boat ride, bird watching
Day 2: Dawn photography at lake, tea garden walk, return to Sylhet

tours.title: Dhaka Sadarghat Launch Cruise
tours.description: Board a traditional rocket paddle steamer from Sadarghat and cruise through Bangladesh's iconic river highways.
tourPlan: Day 1 Evening: Board rocket steamer at Sadarghat, overnight cruise
Day 2 Morning: Arrive Barisal, optional extension or return

tours.title: Khulna Jessore Jessore Road Historical Trek
tours.description: Walk along the historic Jessore Road immortalized in Allen Ginsberg's poem and discover the border region's heritage.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Jessore, historical road walk, Michael Madhusudan Museum
Day 2: Chaitanyapur historical site, Jessore-Benapole border view, return

tours.title: Barisal Kuakata Surf & Yoga Retreat
tours.description: A wellness retreat combining morning yoga on the beach, surfing lessons, and meditation by the sea at Kuakata.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Kuakata, evening beach meditation
Day 2-4: Morning yoga, afternoon surfing, evening sunset watch
Day 5: Farewell meditation, departure

tours.title: Rangpur Tajhat Palace Luxury Tour
tours.description: A curated luxury tour of Rangpur's Tajhat Palace, with exclusive evening dining at royal-themed restaurant and private museum access.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Rangpur, private Tajhat Palace tour at golden hour
Day 2: Rangpur Museum collection, royal dinner, cultural evening
Day 3: Pienikhi Bazaar heritage walk, departure

tours.title: Chittagong WWII War Cemetery & Memorial Tour
tours.description: A poignant historical tour visiting the Chittagong War Cemetery, the only WWII Commonwealth cemetery in Bangladesh.
tourPlan: Morning: Chittagong WWII War Cemetery, wreath laying ceremony
Afternoon: Chittagong Ethnological Museum, city war monument, return

tours.title: Dhaka Jamdani Weaving Village Tour
tours.description: Visit the UNESCO-recognized Jamdani weavers' villages near Dhaka and witness the intricate art of handloom weaving.
tourPlan: Morning: Depart Dhaka, arrive Rupganj Jamdani village
Midday: Master weaver workshop, handloom demonstration
Afternoon: Textile museum, traditional lunch, return to Dhaka

tours.title: Sylhet Satchhari Forest Trek
tours.description: Trek through Satchhari National Park, home to hoolock gibbons, king cobras, and rare birds in a lush mixed evergreen forest.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Habiganj, park orientation, afternoon gibbon tracking
Day 2: Dawn bird watching, reptile habitat walk, return to Sylhet

tours.title: Bagerhat Mangrove Kayaking Adventure
tours.description: Kayak through the winding waterways of Bagerhat's mangroves, discovering hidden creeks and tidal forest ecosystems.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Bagerhat, kayaking orientation, evening paddle
Day 2: Full-day mangrove kayak expedition, tidal creek exploration
Day 3: Morning paddle, Sixty Dome Mosque visit, return

tours.title: Mymensingh Netrokona Ethnic Village Tour
tours.description: Explore Netrokona's ethnic Hajong and Garo communities, their festivals, bamboo architecture, and tribal cuisine.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Netrokona, Garo village introduction, evening ceremony
Day 2: Hajong village, bamboo craft making, tribal lunch
Day 3: Someshwari river boat ride, return to Mymensingh

tours.title: Rangpur Pirganj Terracotta Temple Tour
tours.description: Discover the terracotta-decorated temples of Pirganj and surrounding areas, rare surviving gems of Bengal architecture.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Pirganj, Kantajew-style local temple, terracotta art trail
Day 2: Surrounding villages with temple ruins, local craft market, return

tours.title: Dhaka Corporate Incentive City Tour
tours.description: Customized corporate group tour of Dhaka with team-building activities, business district sightseeing, and networking dinner.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive, business district tour, team dinner
Day 2: Team building activities, city cultural tour, networking gala
Day 3: Factory/industry visit, farewell brunch, departure

tours.title: Cox's Bazar Parasailing & Water Sports Day
tours.description: An adrenaline-packed day of parasailing, jet skiing, banana boating, and wind-surfing at Cox's Bazar beach.
tourPlan: Morning: Parasailing session (2 flights per person)
Midday: Banana boating, jet ski rides, beach lunch
Afternoon: Wind surfing lesson, beach volleyball

tours.title: Khulna Satkhira Hindu Temples Circuit
tours.description: A religious circuit through Satkhira's magnificent 200-year-old Hindu temples, ghats, and Durga Puja festival grounds.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Satkhira, historic Hindu temples, evening Durga Puja
Day 2: Ancient temple complex, river ghats, puja ceremony, return

tours.title: Barisal Luxury River Cruise
tours.description: A premium river cruise through the waterways of Barisal on a luxury vessel with gourmet dining and private cabins.
tourPlan: Day 1: Board luxury cruise, welcome dinner, evening canal
Day 2: Floating market, island village stop
Day 3: Kuakata day excursion from cruise
Day 4: River delta cruise, sunset gala dinner
Day 5: Return to Barisal, disembarkation

tours.title: Netrokona Haor Bird Watching Expedition
tours.description: A serious bird watching expedition in Netrokona's haor wetlands during winter migration season.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Netrokona, evening haor orientation
Day 2: Full-day bird watching expedition (100+ species expected)
Day 3: Dawn photography session, return to Mymensingh

tours.title: Chittagong Hill Tracts Jeep Safari
tours.description: An off-road jeep safari through the rugged hills and river valleys of the Chittagong Hill Tracts.
tourPlan: Day 1: Depart Chittagong, off-road entry to CHT
Day 2: Deep valley safari, tribal village
Day 3: Mountain road challenge, jungle camp
Day 4: River ford crossing, hilltop sunrise
Day 5: Return to Chittagong

tours.title: Sylhet Bisnakandi Stone River Tour
tours.description: Visit Bisnakandi in Sylhet where crystal water streams over flat stones surrounded by green hills and waterfalls.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Sylhet, morning drive to Bisnakandi via Kanaighat
Day 1: Stone river walk, waterfall swim, photography
Day 2: Sunrise river, village breakfast, return to Sylhet

tours.title: Rajshahi Natore Rajbari Palace Tour
tours.description: Explore the magnificent Natore Rajbari palace complex, the seat of the famous Rani Bhabani and 18th-century Bengal history.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Natore, Natore Rajbari walking tour, Sataish building
Day 2: Rani Bhabani Museum, Natore Zoo & park, return to Rajshahi

tours.title: Barisal Family River & Nature Package
tours.description: A relaxing family package through Barisal's rivers, guava orchards, and paddy fields with kids-friendly activities.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Barisal, afternoon river cruise
Day 2: Guava orchard visit, paddy field walk, kids games
Day 3: Pirojpur canal walk, local market, return

tours.title: Chittagong Seafood Culinary Tour
tours.description: A gourmet tour of Chittagong's seafood culture, visiting fish markets, coastal kitchens, and top seafood restaurants.
tourPlan: Day 1: Fishery Ghat market tour, Patenga beach seafood cooking class
Day 2: Traditional Chittagonian seafood restaurant tour, mezban feast

tours.title: Rangpur Eco Village Homestay
tours.description: Stay with a local family in a Rangpur village, participate in daily life, and explore the agricultural heartland.
tourPlan: Day 1: Arrive Mithapukur, family welcome, evening village walk
Day 2: Paddy field work, cooking with host family, local market by bicycle
Day 3: Farewell traditional breakfast, return to Rangpur

tours.title: Khulna Luxury Sundarbans Cruise
tours.description: An exclusive luxury cruise deep into the Sundarbans on a private vessel with gourmet dining, spa, and naturalist.
tourPlan: Day 1: Board vessel at Khulna, welcome dinner
Day 2-3: Deep Sundarbans wildlife watching
Day 4: Tiger territory exploration with armed escort
Day 5: Dublar Char island excursion
Day 6: Return to Khulna, farewell brunch
